title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arena Animation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arena Animation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
